records.name: Think-pair-share
records.description: Have learners think, discuss in pairs, then share.
records.template: Take a moment to think about {point}, then share your take with a neighbor.

records.name: Advance organizer
records.template: Before details, here's the big picture of {topic}: {point}.

records.name: Misconception flag
records.description: Name and correct a common misconception.
records.template: A common misconception about {topic} is the opposite of {point} - let's clear that up.

records.name: Dual coding
records.description: Pair words with a visual/mental image.
records.template: Picture {point} as a simple diagram as I explain {topic}.

records.name: Spaced recall
records.template: Without looking back, what do you recall about {point}?

records.name: Concrete then abstract
records.template: Start with one concrete case of {point}, then we'll generalize the rule.

records.name: Importance signaling
records.description: Tell learners what will be assessed or matters most.
records.template: This part about {point} is exam-worthy - mark it.

records.name: Light humor
records.description: A light, on-topic aside to maintain attention.
records.template: Here's a light way to remember {point} so it sticks.

records.name: Socratic follow-up
records.description: Probe reasoning with a follow-up question.
records.template: Good - and why does {point} hold? What would break it?

records.name: Preview-review sandwich
records.description: Preview, teach, then review the same point.
records.template: We'll preview {point}, work through it, then review it together.
